title: SQMH — Spacetime Quantum Metabolism Hypothesis: BAO/SN/CMB/RSD joint analysis and SQT reconstruction
description:
Spacetime Quantum Metabolism Hypothesis (SQMH) project. Repository contains the original Korean-language hypothesis document (base.md), the Phase 1–6 verification record, the final negative-result paper draft (paper/negative_result.md), and the SQT (Spacetime Quantum Theory) reconstruction line starting at L30. The pipeline runs a joint likelihood over DESI DR2 BAO (13 points, full covariance), DESY5 supernovae, compressed Planck CMB, and RSD (f sigma_8) data.

The principal scientific result is a no-go verdict for the simple background-coupled SQMH quintessence family (V_mass, V_RP, V_exp) against the joint dataset, and a parallel SQT reconstruction line (L30+) that explores BAO-only fits with explicit honest accounting of budget-limited MCMC and Bayesian Occam penalties. All re-occurrence-prevention rules (CLAUDE.md) are versioned with the source.

DOI placeholder pending Zenodo deposit; replace 10.5281/zenodo.PLACEHOLDER with the assigned concept DOI on first release.
notes: Placeholder DOI '10.5281/zenodo.PLACEHOLDER' will be replaced with the concept DOI assigned by Zenodo upon first deposit. Contact: genesos@gmail.com.
